from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, DateTime, ForeignKey, Table
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from datetime import datetime

engine = create_engine('sqlite:///bicycle_shop.db')
Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)

class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'))
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'))
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory")

Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
session = Session()

def add_bicycle(name, description, price):
    bicycle = Bicycle(name=name, description=description, price=price)
    session.add(bicycle)
    session.commit()

def add_spare_part(name, description, price):
    spare_part = SparePart(name=name, description=description, price=price)
    session.add(spare_part)
    session.commit()

def add_accessory(name, description, price):
    accessory = Accessory(name=name, description=description, price=price)
    session.add(accessory)
    session.commit()

def add_order(bicycle_id, spare_part_id, accessory_id):
    order = Order(bicycle_id=bicycle_id, spare_part_id=spare_part_id, accessory_id=accessory_id)
    session.add(order)
    session.commit()

def delete_bicycle(id):
    bicycle = session.query(Bicycle).filter_by(id=id).first()
    session.delete(bicycle)
    session.commit()

def delete_spare_part(id):
    spare_part = session.query(SparePart).filter_by(id=id).first()
    session.delete(spare_part)
    session.commit()

def delete_accessory(id):
    accessory = session.query(Accessory).filter_by(id=id).first()
    session.delete(accessory)
    session.commit()

def delete_order(id):
    order = session.query(Order).filter_by(id=id).first()
    session.delete(order)
    session.commit()

def update_bicycle(id, name, description, price):
    bicycle = session.query(Bicycle).filter_by(id=id).first()
    bicycle.name = name
    bicycle.description = description
    bicycle.price = price
    session.commit()

def update_spare_part(id, name, description, price):
    spare_part = session.query(SparePart).filter_by(id=id).first()
    spare_part.name = name
    spare_part.description = description
    spare_part.price = price
    session.commit()

def update_accessory(id, name, description, price):
    accessory = session.query(Accessory).filter_by(id=id).first()
    accessory.name = name
    accessory.description = description
    accessory.price = price
    session.commit()

def get_bicycles():
    return session.query(Bicycle).all()

def get_spare_parts():
    return session.query(SparePart).all()

def get_accessories():
    return session.query(Accessory).all()

def get_orders():
    return session.query(Order).all()

def search_bicycles(name):
    return session.query(Bicycle).filter(Bicycle.name.like('%' + name + '%')).all()

def search_spare_parts(name):
    return session.query(SparePart).filter(SparePart.name.like('%' + name + '%')).all()

def search_accessories(name):
    return session.query(Accessory).filter(Accessory.name.like('%' + name + '%')).all()

def close_session():
    session.close()

import sqlite3

class BicycleShop:
    def __init__(self, db_name):
        self.conn = sqlite3.connect(db_name)
        self.cursor = self.conn.cursor()
        self.create_tables()

    def create_tables(self):
        self.cursor.execute('''
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bicycles
            (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, price REAL)
        ''')
        self.cursor.execute('''
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accessories
            (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, price REAL)
        ''')
        self.cursor.execute('''
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS orders
            (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, bicycle_id INTEGER, accessory_id INTEGER, total REAL,
            FOREIGN KEY (bicycle_id) REFERENCES bicycles (id),
            FOREIGN KEY (accessory_id) REFERENCES accessories (id))
        ''')
        self.conn.commit()

    def add_bicycle(self, name, price):
        self.cursor.execute('INSERT INTO bicycles (name, price) VALUES (?, ?)', (name, price))
        self.conn.commit()

    def add_accessory(self, name, price):
        self.cursor.execute('INSERT INTO accessories (name, price) VALUES (?, ?)', (name, price))
        self.conn.commit()

    def delete_bicycle(self, id):
        self.cursor.execute('DELETE FROM bicycles WHERE id = ?', (id,))
        self.conn.commit()

    def delete_accessory(self, id):
        self.cursor.execute('DELETE FROM accessories WHERE id = ?', (id,))
        self.conn.commit()

    def update_bicycle(self, id, name, price):
        self.cursor.execute('UPDATE bicycles SET name = ?, price = ? WHERE id = ?', (name, price, id))
        self.conn.commit()

    def update_accessory(self, id, name, price):
        self.cursor.execute('UPDATE accessories SET name = ?, price = ? WHERE id = ?', (name, price, id))
        self.conn.commit()

    def get_bicycles(self):
        self.cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM bicycles')
        return self.cursor.fetchall()

    def get_accessories(self):
        self.cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM accessories')
        return self.cursor.fetchall()

    def get_orders(self):
        self.cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM orders')
        return self.cursor.fetchall()

    def place_order(self, bicycle_id, accessory_id):
        self.cursor.execute('SELECT price FROM bicycles WHERE id = ?', (bicycle_id,))
        bicycle_price = self.cursor.fetchone()[0]
        self.cursor.execute('SELECT price FROM accessories WHERE id = ?', (accessory_id,))
        accessory_price = self.cursor.fetchone()[0]
        total = bicycle_price + accessory_price
        self.cursor.execute('INSERT INTO orders (bicycle_id, accessory_id, total) VALUES (?, ?, ?)', (bicycle_id, accessory_id, total))
        self.conn.commit()

    def close_connection(self):
        self.conn.close()

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

class VARwfzDd:
    def __init__(self, data, p=1):
        self.data = data
        self.p = p
        self.params = None

    def fit(self):
        X = self.data[:-self.p]
        y = self.data[self.p:]
        X_lag = pd.concat([X.shift(i) for i in range(1, self.p+1)], axis=1)
        X_lag = X_lag.dropna()
        y = y[X_lag.index]
        self.params = np.linalg.lstsq(X_lag, y, rcond=None)[0]

    def forecast(self, steps):
        forecast = []
        last_obs = self.data[-self.p:]
        for i in range(steps):
            lagged = pd.concat([last_obs.shift(i) for i in range(1, self.p+1)], axis=1)
            forecast.append(np.dot(lagged.iloc[-1], self.params))
            last_obs = pd.concat([last_obs, pd.DataFrame([forecast[-1]], index=[last_obs.index[-1]+1])])
        return forecast
